message.content:
[1/5] Source: git-inceptionlabs | Status: completed
Bemenderfer LLC is an Indiana‑based consulting firm that specializes in Epicor Kinetic/ERP services. Since its founding in 2008, the company provides:
ERP consulting, implementation, training, and integration – helping businesses streamline operations with Epicor solutions.
Data‑portal and workflow optimization – offering tools to improve data visibility and process efficiency.
The firm is headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana, and markets itself as a “Premier ERP Solutions & Epicor Consulting” provider
1
. Its LinkedIn profile confirms the focus on Epicor Kinetic/ERP consulting and notes the company’s long‑standing experience in the space
2
. Additional business details, such as funding and corporate ranking, are listed on Crunchbase, which also highlights the company’s private status and location in Indianapolis
3
.

[2/5] Source: git-chatgpt | Status: completed
I can help find information about Bemenderfer LLC. Could you clarify if you want general company details, such as its industry and services, or more specific data like leadership, financials, or recent news?

[3/5] Source: git-grok | Status: completed
Bemenderfer LLC (also styled as Bemenderfer) is a small, privately held software consulting firm based in Indianapolis, Indiana, founded in 2008 by David Bemenderfer (Founder and President).⁠LinkedIn
It specializes in Epicor Kinetic (and earlier versions like Vantage/Vista) ERP systems, offering:
Consulting
Implementation
Training
Streamlining
Integration
Customization
Business process optimization
The company also develops its own DataPortal product, which provides mobile-friendly access to ERP data and tools for field/mobile workforces. Services extend to related areas like gap analysis, Crystal Reports/SSRS, method/data directives, automation, inventory systems, CAD BOM integration, and real-time data solutions.⁠Bemenderfer
Key details:
Size: 2–10 employees (reports vary around 5).
Focus: Helping manufacturing and industrial clients (aerospace, food production, automotive, etc.) maximize ERP value through practical business process alignment rather than generic implementations.
Website: bemenderfer.com
BBB: Accredited; PO Box in Indianapolis.
LinkedIn: BEMENDERFER LLC — emphasizes long-term relationships and hands-on experience (team has both consulting and internal ERP admin backgrounds).
It operates as a boutique partner for Epicor users seeking optimization, troubleshooting, and custom integrations rather than a large-scale systems integrator.
(Note: There is a separate individual named Neil Bemenderfer involved in mediation/legal services in the same area, but he is not connected to this LLC.)

[4/5] Source: git-qwen | Status: completed
Bemenderfer LLC is a privately-held software development and consulting firm based in Indianapolis, Indiana, founded in 2008 by David Bemenderfer, J.D. 
领英企业服务
www.privco.com
Core Focus:
Specializes in Epicor Kinetic/ERP consulting, training, implementation, streamlining, and integration 
www.bbb.org
www.crunchbase.com
Offers proprietary Data Portal software for real-time data integration and IoT connectivity 
www.bemenderfer.com
www.bemenderfer.com
Services Include:
Epicor & Business Process Consulting
ERP Implementation tailored to client needs
Custom API/connectors built using Epicor's BAQ reporting tool
Business advisory and web-integrated systems 
www.bbb.org
www.bemenderfer.com
Company Profile:
Size: 2–10 employees 
领英企业服务
Industries served: aerospace, food production, industrial manufacturing, automotive, and more 
www.bemenderfer.com
BBB Accredited (since 3/7/2025) with an A+ rating 
www.bbb.org
Privately held; estimated revenue ~$428K, valuation ~$1.4M 
prospeo.io
Ethos: Founded on ethical business practices, with a mission to deliver effective, integrity-driven ERP solutions 
www.bemenderfer.com
www.bemenderfer.com
Website: bemenderfer.com
www.bemenderfer.com
Need details on a specific service, contact info, or client case studies? Let me know.
+30

[5/5] Source: git-perplexity | Status: completed
Bemenderfer LLC appears to be an Indianapolis-based software consultancy focused on Epicor ERP implementations and related process optimization. They offer services in ERP consulting, training, integration, and custom solutions, and have emphasized Epicor-specific work since around 2008. The company is described as a small private firm with 2–10 employees, headquartered in Indianapolis, IN, and highlights capabilities in project management, data analysis, and end-user training.
linkedin
If you’re evaluating them for a project, consider:
Core focus: Epicor ERP optimization, reporting (SSRS/Crystal Reports), and system integration
Services: BAQs, dashboards, data harvesting, and custom solutions
Client fit: manufacturing, finance, and operations environments typical of Epicor users
Location: Indianapolis area; potential for onsite engagements or regional remote work
Would you like me to narrow this to current client industries, typical project scopes, or verify latest client testimonials? If you have a location preference or project type (e.g., ERP upgrade, BAQ development), I can tailor what to ask or prepare a vendor questions list.

auto_synthesis.content:
Bemenderfer LLC is a small, privately held software consulting firm based in Indianapolis, Indiana, founded in 2008 by David Bemenderfer. It specializes in Epicor Kinetic/ERP systems and offers consulting, implementation, training, integration, and process optimization services. The firm also develops a proprietary DataPortal product for mobile-friendly ERP data access and real-time integration.

Key details:

Employees: 2–10

Focus industries: Manufacturing, aerospace, food production, automotive, and other industrial sectors

Services: ERP consulting, project management, BAQs, dashboards, Crystal Reports/SSRS, CAD/BOM integration, automation, and custom API/connectors

Reputation: BBB accredited (A+ rating), emphasizes ethical, practical ERP solutions

Revenue/valuation (est.): ~$428K revenue, ~$1.4M valuation

Website: bemenderfer.com

The company emphasizes hands-on Epicor expertise, business process alignment, and long-term client relationships.
